p_name: Regular viscose kimono all over fancy
p_name_keyword: Regular viscose kimono all over fancy
p_name_proper: Regular viscose kimono all over fancy
p_text: open kimono, long below hip, kimono sleeve, ethnic print, metal plate with koröshi logo. composition: 85% viscose, 15% polyamide
